parameters.query: ={{`SELECT ap.*, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('entity_id', mid.entity_id, 'conversions_7d', SUM(mid.conversions), 'spend_7d', SUM(mid.spend))) FROM meta_insights_daily mid WHERE mid.date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY mid.entity_id), '[]'::json) AS recent_performance FROM action_plans ap WHERE ap.plan_id = '${$json.plan_id}' AND ap.status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL'`}}

={{`INSERT INTO approvals (plan_id, approver, decision) VALUES ('${$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.plan_id}', '${$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.user}', '${$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.decision}')`}}

={{`INSERT INTO actions_executed (plan_id, entity_level, entity_id, action_type, meta_api_call, meta_api_response, status, executed_at) VALUES ('${$json.plan_id}', '${$json.entity_level}', '${$json.entity_id}', '${$json.action_type}', '${JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g,"''")}'::jsonb, '${JSON.stringify($('Execute Meta API Call').item.json).replace(/'/g,"''")}'::jsonb, 'EXECUTED', NOW())`}}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=✅ *Action Executed*
• Type: `{{$json.action_type}}`
• Entity: `{{$json.entity_name || $json.entity_id}}` ({{$json.entity_level}})
• Plan: `{{$json.plan_id}}`
• Approved by: {{$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.user}}

_To rollback: re-enable entity in Meta Ads Manager or POST status=ACTIVE to the API._

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =❌ Plan `{{$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.plan_id}}` rejected by {{$('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.user}}. No changes made to Meta.
